subject: 電力管理
statement: 有効電力 P=1500kW、力率 cosθ1=0.6（遅れ）の需要家が、力率を cosθ2=0.8 に改善する。必要な電力用コンデンサ（調相設備）容量 Qc〔kvar〕を導出過程とともに求めよ。
figure: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 280 150" role="img" aria-label="電力三角形: 進相容量Qc=875kvarで無効電力を低減（力率改善）" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13"><title>電力三角形: 進相容量Qc=875kvarで無効電力を低減（力率改善）</title><g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="120"/><polygon points="157.5,120 149.4,123.9 149.4,116.1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="165.5" y="132" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">P=1500</text><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="45" y2="-30" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><line x1="157.5" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="-30" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><line x1="45" y1="-30" x2="157.5" y2="-30" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="-30"/><polygon points="157.5,-30 155.8,-21.2 149.5,-25.9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="162.3" y="-40.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">S(前)</text><line x1="45" y1="120" x2="157.5" y2="35.625000000000014"/><polygon points="157.5,35.625000000000014 153.4,43.6 148.7,37.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="163.9" y="26.825000000000017" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">S(後)</text><line x1="143.5" y1="-30" x2="143.5" y2="35.625000000000014"/><polygon points="143.5,35.625000000000014 139.6,27.5 147.4,27.5" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><text x="147.5" y="2.812500000000007" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">Qc=875</text></g></svg>
solution: 改善前後の無効電力差が必要容量: Qc=P(tanθ1−tanθ2)
